notes: Post-repair recheck reconciled the exact-location restaurant-issued menu with the current linked Toast surface into 38 unique food products across four sections.
Frozen reconciliation: 30 exact verified, 3 exact accurately unavailable, 1 variant verified, 2 variants accurately unavailable, 2 stale operational duplicates, and 1 beverage artifact.
All 24 pizza rows retain wheat and gluten from the exact-location universal sourdough crust statement; direct item wording supplies milk or tree-nut where applicable.
32 current items have fixed direct positive disclosures and 6 are accurately unavailable; no negative or cross-contact claim is inferred.
The scoped repair restores restaurant-issued sections, excludes the Checkmate operational duplicates and Atlas beverage, and includes every product published by either current exact-location surface.

findings.summary: Slice Cheese and Whole Cheese omitted the restaurant-issued wheat disclosure.
findings.resolution: Applied wheat and gluten to both Cheese rows as part of the universal pizza-crust repair.

findings.summary: Frozen pizza rows omitted the exact-location universal sourdough crust's wheat/gluten disclosure.
findings.resolution: Applied wheat and gluten to all 24 current pizza rows while retaining only directly supported additional signals.

findings.summary: The frozen record contained operational duplicates, malformed names, and current-location omissions.
findings.resolution: Removed three duplicate operational rows, normalized Fried Cauliflower and Old Bay Fries, and restored Dairy Free Margherita and 8 Makes a Pie.

findings.summary: The frozen extraction flattened food sections, omitted Side of Ranch, and misclassified Underberg Bitters as pizza.
findings.resolution: Restored four consumer sections, added Side of Ranch, and removed the beverage from the food-focused record.

repairs.summary: Reconciled and verified the complete 38-item exact-location Atlas Navy Yard/Andy's food menu and its conservative direct-positive allergen data.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern='Atlas and Andy.s reconciles the current Navy Yard menu' scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Post-repair current menu: 38 unique food products; 32 direct positive disclosures; 6 accurately unavailable results.
